title: Justify shared mode for a Registry-using integration test
prompt: Write `test/my_app/integration/realtime_pubsub_test.exs` that needs to use `mode(:shared)` because it touches `Phoenix.PubSub` which routes through a Registry process that cannot accept allowances. The module must: (1) `use MyApp.DataCase, async: false` (with a comment explaining why), (2) call `Ecto.Adapters.SQL.Sandbox.checkout/1` then `mode(MyApp.Repo, {:shared, self()})` in setup, (3) include at least one test. The comment must mention PubSub and the Registry allowance limitation.
tier_rationale: Justification requirement — must NOT pick shared mode without also going async: false and explaining why.
research_citation: "we give up running db-tests in parallel, which is a sad compromise on Erlang VM" — Piotr Włodarek
